member.summary: Extension methods for to support response format operations.

member.summary: Determines whether the object supports a "ResponseFormat" property of type .
member.param: The instance to check.
member.returns: true if the "ResponseFormat" property exists and is of type ; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Sets the "ResponseFormat" property of the object to the specified response type.
member.typeparam: The type to set as the response format.
member.param: The instance to update.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticOrchestrationLogMessages
member.summary: Extensions for logging .
member.remarks: This extension uses the to generate logging code at compile time to achieve optimized code.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager
member.summary: A manager that manages the flow of a Magentic style chat.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.DefaultMaximumResetsCount
member.summary: The default maximum number of resets allowed.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.DefaultMaximumStallCount
member.summary: The default maximum number of stalls allowed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.MaximumInvocationCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of invocations allowed for the group chat manager.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.MaximumResetCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of resets allowed for the group chat manager.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.MaximumStallCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of stalls allowed for the group chat manager.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.InteractiveCallback
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback to be invoked for interactive input.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.PlanAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Prepares the chat messages for the next step in the group chat process.
member.param: The context for the manager.
A cancellation token.
member.returns: An array of chat message content to be processed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.ReplanAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resets the group chat state and prepares the initial chat messages.
member.param: The context for the manager.
A cancellation token.
member.returns: An array of chat message content representing the reset state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.EvaluateTaskProgressAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates the progress of the current group chat task.
member.param: The context for the manager.
A cancellation token.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManager.PrepareFinalAnswerAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Prepares the final answer for the group chat task.
member.param: The context for the manager.
A cancellation token.
member.remarks: The return type is to allow for rich content responses.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerActor
member.summary: An used to manage a .

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerActor.DefaultDescription
member.summary: A common description for the manager.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique identifier of the agent.
The runtime associated with the agent.
The orchestration context.
The manages the flow of the group-chat.
The team of agents being orchestrated
Identifies the orchestration agent.
The logger to use for the actor

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext
member.summary: Represents the context for the MagenticManager, encapsulating the team, task, and chat history.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The team associated with the context.
The current task or objective for the team.
The chat message history relevant to the current context (not agent conversation history).
The number of responses generated in the current context.
The number of times the context has stalled or not progressed.
The number of times the context has been reset.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.History
member.summary: Gets the chat message history for the current context.
member.remarks: This history refers to the overall context history, not the conversation history of a specific agent.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.ResponseCount
member.summary: The number of responses generated in the current context.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.StallCount
member.summary: The number of times the context has stalled or not progressed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.ResetCount
member.summary: The number of times the context has been reset.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.Team
member.summary: Gets the team associated with this context.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Magentic.MagenticManagerContext.Task
member.summary: Gets the current task or objective for the team, as provided as orchestration input.

member.summary: Common messages used for agent chat patterns.

member.returns: The agent name as a non-empty string

member.summary: Gets the kernel scoped to the current invocation.
member.param: The whose kernel is used as a fallback if does not specify one.
The instance containing invocation-specific options. May be null.
member.returns: The instance to use for the current invocation. Returns the kernel from if specified; otherwise, returns the kernel from .

member.summary: Starts an activity with the specified name and tags.

member.summary: Adds tags to the activity.

member.summary: Adds an event to the activity. Should only be used for events that contain sensitive data.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ActivityExtensions.SetError(System.Diagnostics.Activity,System.Exception)
member.summary: Sets the error status and type on the activity.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics
member.summary: Model diagnostics helper class that provides a set of methods to trace model activities with the OTel semantic conventions. This class contains experimental features and may change in the future. To enable these features, set one of the following switches to true: `Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Experimental.GenAI.EnableOTelDiagnostics` `Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Experimental.GenAI.EnableOTelDiagnosticsSensitive` Or set the following environment variables to true: `SEMANTICKERNEL_EXPERIMENTAL_GENAI_ENABLE_OTEL_DIAGNOSTICS` `SEMANTICKERNEL_EXPERIMENTAL_GENAI_ENABLE_OTEL_DIAGNOSTICS_SENSITIVE`

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.StartCompletionActivity``1(System.Uri,System.String,System.String,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Start a text completion activity for a given model. The activity will be tagged with the a set of attributes specified by the semantic conventions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.StartCompletionActivity``1(System.Uri,System.String,System.String,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatCompletion.ChatHistory,``0)
member.summary: Start a chat completion activity for a given model. The activity will be tagged with the a set of attributes specified by the semantic conventions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.StartAgentInvocationActivity(System.String,System.String,System.String,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatMessageContent})
member.summary: Start an agent invocation activity and return the activity.

member.summary: Set the agent response for a given activity.

member.summary: End the agent streaming response for a given activity.

member.summary: Set the text completion response for a given activity. The activity will be enriched with the response attributes specified by the semantic conventions.

member.summary: Set the chat completion response for a given activity. The activity will be enriched with the response attributes specified by the semantic conventions.
Notify the end of streaming for a given activity.

member.summary: Set the response id for a given activity.
member.param: The activity to set the response id
The response id
member.returns: The activity with the response id set for chaining

member.summary: Set the input tokens usage for a given activity.
member.param: The activity to set the input tokens usage
The number of input tokens used
member.returns: The activity with the input tokens usage set for chaining

member.returns: The activity with the output tokens usage set for chaining

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.IsModelDiagnosticsEnabled
member.summary: Check if model diagnostics is enabled Model diagnostics is enabled if either EnableModelDiagnostics or EnableSensitiveEvents is set to true and there are listeners.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.IsSensitiveEventsEnabled
member.summary: Check if sensitive events are enabled. Sensitive events are enabled if EnableSensitiveEvents is set to true and there are listeners.

member.summary: Convert a chat model response to a JSON string based on the OTel GenAI Semantic Conventions format

member.summary: Set the completion response for a given activity. The `formatCompletions` delegate won't be invoked if events are disabled.
Set the streaming completion response for a given activity.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.OrganizeStreamingContent(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.StreamingKernelContent})
member.summary: Organize streaming content by choice index

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Diagnostics.ModelDiagnostics.ModelDiagnosticsTags
member.summary: Tags used in model diagnostics

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.KernelVerify.AllowedPluginNameSymbolsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9A-Za-z_]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.KernelVerify.AllowedFunctionNameSymbolsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9A-Za-z_-]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [-0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.KernelVerify.ParametersUniqueness(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.KernelParameterMetadata})
member.summary: Make sure every function parameter name is unique
member.param: List of parameters

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.

The name of the parameter being checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Verify.FilenameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[^.]+\\.[^.]+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character other than '.' atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character other than '.' greedily at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Verify.NotNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Equivalent of ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Verify.ValidHostnameSegment(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a hostname segment string is safe for use as a URL segment, preventing URL injection.
member.param: The hostname segment string to validate (e.g., 'us-east1', 'europe-west4')
Optional parameter name for the exception
member.exception: Thrown when the location contains invalid characters or patterns

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.AppContextSwitchHelper
member.summary: Helper class to get app context switch value

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.AppContextSwitchHelper.GetConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of the specified app switch or environment variable if it is set. If the switch or environment variable is not set, return false. The app switch value takes precedence over the environment variable.
member.param: The name of the app switch.
The name of the environment variable.
member.returns: The value of the app switch or environment variable if it is set; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.IListExtensions.AddRange``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Adds a range of elements from the specified source to the target .
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the list.
member.param: The target to add elements to.
The source containing elements to add to the target .

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter
member.summary: Provides internal utility methods for converting types to strings with consideration for CultureInfo.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.ConvertToString(System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts the given object value to a string representation using the appropriate CultureInfo.
member.param: The object to convert.
The CultureInfo to consider during conversion.
member.returns: A string representation of the object value, considering the specified CultureInfo.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.GetTypeToStringConverterDelegate(System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieves a type-to-string converter delegate for the specified source type.
member.param: The source Type for which to retrieve the type-to-string converter delegate.
member.returns: A Func delegate for converting the source type to a string, considering CultureInfo, or null if no suitable converter is found.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.s_converters
member.summary: Converter functions for converting types to strings.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1
member.summary: Provides a collection of non-null items.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1._items
member.summary: The underlying list of items.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The initial collection of items to populate this collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the item at the specified index in the collection.
member.param: The index of the item to get or set.
member.returns: The item at the specified index.
member.exception: The was not valid for this collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an item to the collection.
member.param: The item to add.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all items from the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Contains(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether an item is in the collection.
member.param: The item to locate.
member.returns: True if the item is found in the collection; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.CopyTo(`0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies all of the items in the collection to an array, starting at the specified destination array index.
member.param: The destination array into which the items should be copied.
The zero-based index into at which copying should begin.
member.exception: The number of items in the collection is greater than the available space from to the end of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.IndexOf(`0)
member.summary: Searches for the specified item and returns the index of the first occurrence.
member.param: The item to locate.
member.returns: The index of the first found occurrence of the specified item; -1 if the item could not be found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Insert(System.Int32,`0)
member.summary: Inserts an item into the collection at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which the item should be inserted.
The item to insert.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of the specified item from the collection.
member.param: The item to remove from the collection.
member.returns: True if the item was successfully removed; false if it wasn't located in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the item at the specified index from the collection.
member.param: The index of the item to remove.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.TypeConverterFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating TypeConverter instances based on a provided type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.TypeConverterFactory.GetTypeConverter(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns a TypeConverter instance for the specified type.
member.param: The Type of the object to convert.
member.returns: A TypeConverter instance if a suitable converter is found, otherwise null.

member.summary: Provides an implementation of that contains no services.

member.summary: Exception extension methods.

member.name: M:System.ExceptionExtensions.IsCriticalException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Check if an exception is of a type that should not be caught by the kernel.
member.param: Exception.
member.returns: True if is a critical exception and should not be caught.

member.summary: Source: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/DiagnosticsOptions.cs Values: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/azure.core.diagnosticsoptions.istelemetryenabled?view=azure-dotnet

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the AllowedPluginNameSymbolsRegex method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AllowedPluginNameSymbolsRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AllowedPluginNameSymbolsRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AllowedPluginNameSymbolsRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiWordChars
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_20FF03FEFFFF87FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
